1. CVE-2026-20182 — Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Controller Authentication Bypass Vulnerab
2. CVE-2026-42208 — BerriAI LiteLLM SQL Injection Vulnerability

4. CVE-2026-42897 — Microsoft Exchange Server Cross-Site Scripting Vulnerability
5. CVE-2026-6973 — Ivanti Endpoint Manager Mobile (EPMM) Improper Input Validation 
6. CompTIA Security+
